coach_note: Returning from a sore throat over the weekend — lost Fri-Mon to illness. Resting HR stayed at 41 bpm so no systemic impact, but sleep quality tanked (scores of 55-68 vs usual 80+). Back to easy running Tuesday, with the key 5×2k session on Thursday if feeling 100%. CTL has dipped from 42 to 37.7 post-Paddock Wood — expected after the race + lighter week + illness. The priority this week is getting back on the horse without forcing it. The fitness bank is deep enough that a few days off costs nothing.

predictions.rationale: Paddock Wood 1:17:34 on a hilly course as practice race. 4×2k reps at 5:35/mi (103% RP) handled comfortably. Flat Bristol course + 7 weeks of specific work puts the target within reach. The 6×2k session in week 4 will be the key fitness confirmation.

PB 16:11 set during marathon training with no 5k work. Burgess parkrun 16:59 in late Feb untapered on a slow course. The HM block is building a bigger aerobic engine — with dedicated 5k speed work over summer at Battersea, sub-16 is realistic.
